title: botrypus decurrens
intro: Botrypus decurrens, also known as the running grape fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Ophioglossaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Botrypus decurrens include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Botrypus decurrens can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
